creator: w-info@xs4all.nl
text:
Since installing FreeBSD 8.2 B1 (upgrading from 8.0) HellaNZB didn't work any more (stopping with an error ImportError: cannot import name _NO_FILENO). It seems a problem since spring 2010 I think du e to changes in python. There are many reports from Linux users with the same problem.

Fix: 

I already sent this to the maintainer (pjenvey@groovie.org) on 12-12-2010 btw. but I never got a response...


I've just installed FreeBSD 8.2 B1 and HellaNZB doesn't work (stopping with an error ImportError: cannot import name _NO_FILENO). It seems a problem since spring this year, there are 2 patches available that fix it for me:

http://pastie.org/877281
http://pastie.org/877271
How-To-Repeat: Try to run hellanzb
